meaning: adj.结晶状的n.水晶,水晶饰品,结晶,晶体
examples: A crystal chandelier lit the room.
She was wearing a strand of crystal beads.
Some of the finest drinking glasses are made from lead crystal.
One conclusion was crystal clear: Expect realignments in financial power both globally and nationally.
Neighbouring Los Nevados National Park features crystal mountain lakes and eight volcanoes, including two above 5, 000m.
